additionalPlain:
With approximately 155 million monthly active users, WEBTOON Entertainment’s IP & Creator Ecosystem of aligned brands and platforms include WEBTOON, Wattpad--the world’s leading webnovel platform--WEBTOON Productions, Studio N, Studio LICO, WEBTOON Unscrolled, LINE MANGA, and eBookJapan, among others.
 
Join us and work with some of the biggest artists, IP, and fandoms in comics!
#WEBTOON
additional:
With approximately 155 million monthly active users, WEBTOON Entertainment’s IP & Creator Ecosystem of aligned brands and platforms include WEBTOON, Wattpad--the world’s leading webnovel platform--WEBTOON Productions, Studio N, Studio LICO, WEBTOON Unscrolled, LINE MANGA, and eBookJapan, among others.
 
Join us and work with some of the biggest artists, IP, and fandoms in comics!
#WEBTOON
descriptionPlain:
WEBTOON Entertainment is a leading global entertainment company and home to some of the world's largest storytelling platforms. As the global leader and pioneer of the mobile webcomic format, WEBTOON Entertainment has transformed comics and visual storytelling for fans and creators.
 
Leveraging incredible stories and insights from WEBTOON and Wattpad’s combined audience of more than 166 million people, WEBTOON Consumer Goods has pioneered a bold, global, fan-first approach to consumer products. We work with the top publishers, manufacturers and licensees globally to bring exciting products to our fandoms.
 


The WEBTOON Consumer Goods team is seeking a detail-oriented, process-driven Sales Support Specialist to assist our Sales teams in managing the sales process as well as support customer account maintenance. This part-time position will work approximately 20 hours per week and will be primarily responsible for providing operational and administrative support as well as daily Asana and Airtable workflow maintenance. 
 
This is a 6 month 1099 contract role, approximately 20 hours per week.
description:
WEBTOON Entertainment is a leading global entertainment company and home to some of the world's largest storytelling platforms. As the global leader and pioneer of the mobile webcomic format, WEBTOON Entertainment has transformed comics and visual storytelling for fans and creators.
 
Leveraging incredible stories and insights from WEBTOON and Wattpad’s combined audience of more than 166 million people, WEBTOON Consumer Goods has pioneered a bold, global, fan-first approach to consumer products. We work with the top publishers, manufacturers and licensees globally to bring exciting products to our fandoms.
 

The WEBTOON Consumer Goods team is seeking a detail-oriented, process-driven Sales Support Specialist to assist our Sales teams in managing the sales process as well as support customer account maintenance. This part-time position will work approximately 20 hours per week and will be primarily responsible for providing operational and administrative support as well as daily Asana and Airtable workflow maintenance. 
 
This is a 6 month 1099 contract role, approximately 20 hours per week.

lists.content:
• Support deal flow maintenance, providing operational and administrative sales support

  • Track internal and external communications and responses with operational requests in collaboration with the Sales team

  • Enter details of executed contracts and terms into internal systems (Asana, Airtable and Connect)

  • Coordinate delivery requests for Publisher partners, ensuring contractual obligations and deadlines are met

  • Work closely with the Sales team and Finance team to ensure all royalty reports and payments are tracked and received on time

  • Escalate issues as needed and assist in resolving delivery, royalty reporting and operational challenges

  • Provide operational support to members of the Content Sales team as needed

  • Manage newsletter outreach

  • Additional duties and projects as assigned

• 2-3 years of sales support experience

  • Experience with Asana and AirTable is a must in addition to strong computer skills

  • Consistent track record of meeting or exceeding assigned jobs

  • The ability to work efficiently and independently. Strong communication skills (verbal and written) with the aptitude to communicate effectively in both individual and group settings regardless of audience

  • Meticulous organizational and follow up skills with the ability to multi-task, prioritize and manage time effectively

$27 - $32 / hourly
Please note, the above range is listed in USD. This position does not qualify for benefits.
